chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr.Tr. Application No.S-62 of 2016 Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case 31-05-2019 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, D.P.G.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- None present for the applicant. Same was the position on the last date of hearing. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
